name: levelup-learning-monolith
description: Full-stack LevelUp Learning platform with monolithic deployment

scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.build: cd client && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && (if [ -d "dist" ]; then rm -rf dist; fi) && cp -r client/dist dist
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev --prefix server"
